faq.question: How can I check flood risk risk for a specific property in Concord?

faq.question: Does flood risk risk affect property insurance in Concord?
faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Concord can be influenced by flood risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.
